description_text: Kotobukiya Articulated Figure — Scalpel / The Doctor (Transformers: Dark of the Moon) Prepare your dissecting table for the most eccentric and terrifying medical specialist in the Decepticon ranks. From the live-action cinematic universe of Transformers: Dark of the Moon comes the highly detailed Transformers Scalpel Action Figure , masterfully executed by Kotobukiya . Known colloquially as "The Doctor," this insectoid scout is built to bring unmatched character accuracy and mechanical fidelity straight to your display setup. Measuring an impressive total length of approximately 180mm (18cm), this non-scale figure features an incredibly dynamic engineering framework boasting 32 points of articulation . Kotobukiya's design team has ensured that all six front legs, the neck, and the main head structure move independently. Even his tiny mechanical eyebrows are articulated, allowing collectors to sculpt a wide variety of expressive, sinister, or hyper-focused expressions. The entire body is treated with a premium, realistic weathered paint finish, capturing the oil-stained, battle-worn aesthetic of a frontline military doctor. description_text: Plex DefoReal Series — Godzilla (2016) Awakened Glow-in-the-Dark Version Re-establish total atomic dominance on your shelf grid with a beautiful fusion of deformed styling and cinematic terror. To celebrate the 10th anniversary of the groundbreaking film Shin Godzilla , the highly sought-after DefoReal Godzilla (2016) Awakened Glow-in-the-Dark Ver. makes its magnificent return to the Plex collection lineup. This premium asset uses the beloved, intricate 2019 mold to condense the overwhelming horror of the Fourth Form into a distinct, high-fidelity layout. Standing at an impressive height of approximately 14cm (140mm), this figure masterfully balances realistic textures with a stylized, oversized 2.5-head body proportion layout. The heavy-detailed PVC skin sculpt captures the charred, scar-tissue texture, grotesque muscle fibers, and rows of irregular fangs that define the 2016 design. This special edition is heavily elevated by advanced material tracking that reacts to environmental conditions, giving the radioactive skin elements a striking presence even under standard lighting. The true crown jewel engineering feature of this release is its comprehensive electronic functionality.

The engineering layout showcases intricate mechanical linkages throughout the neck, torso, and limbs, delivering realistic interlocking cylinder actions during movement. description_text: Bandai S.H.MonsterArts — Biollante: Wakasa Bay Decisive Battle Version Unleash the ultimate biological terror of the Heisei era straight into your kaiju display layout. From the legendary 1989 sci-fi masterpiece Godzilla vs. Biollante , the massive mutated bio-monster returns to the premier S.H.MonsterArts articulation lineage in an incredible, updated Wakasa Bay Decisive Battle Version . This premium collector's asset captures the overwhelming presence, asymmetrical terror, and colossal physical volume of the screen asset with stunning accuracy. The core structural framework boasts an elite sculpting pedigree, masterfully engineered by legendary kaiju sculptor Fuyuki Shinada —the very artisan who designed and constructed the actual physical Biollante suit used during the 1989 film production. Every intricate, wood-like layer of plant fiber bark, every terrifying animalistic tooth alignment, and the cavernous, fanged maw have been recreated with meticulous fidelity. This special edition features an overhauled paint layout inspired deeply by the original theatrical poster colors, utilizing detailed brush-work highlights to simulate cinematic lighting.
